sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10590" key="a)ntiteu/xw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιτεύχω</orth>, <sense id="n10590.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make in opposition,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀντιτέτυκτο</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0239.tlg002:35" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antim.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">35</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> codd.</sense> </entryFree>
